---
title: ""
description: ""
---

## Current collaborations

::: {.project-card}

### [Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb](https://www.damtp.cam.ac.uk/person/cbs31)

**University of Cambridge**

**Topics**

- Inertial PDEs for image inpainting
- Variational imaging
- Dissipative and accelerated flows
- Nonlinear regression as a dynamical system

:::

::: {.project-card}

### [Elisabeth Larsson](https://www.uu.se/en/contact-and-organisation/staff?query=N94-2143)

**Uppsala University**

**Topics**

- Radial basis functions
- Kernel interpolation
- Boundary-aware approximation

:::

::: {.project-card}

### [Jan Glaubitz](https://www.janglaubitz.com)

**Linköping University**

**Topics**

- Variational data assimilation
- 3D-Var and BV regularization
- Inverse problems

:::

::: {.project-card}

### [Mengwu Guo](https://www.mengwuguo.com)

**Lund University**

**Topics**

- Gradient and momentum flow solvers
- Krylov methods and exponential integrators
- Numerical linear algebra

:::

## Collaboration scope

I am interested in collaborations around:

- Dynamical systems approaches to scientific computing
- PDE-based image analysis
- Kernel methods and approximation theory
- Randomized numerical linear algebra
- Inverse problems and data assimilation
- Uncertainty quantification

## Collaboration philosophy

I enjoy collaborations that are driven by curiosity and interesting mathematical questions. I am equally interested in theoretical and applied research and enjoy working across both.

## Contact

For collaboration inquiries, please reach out to:

**Email:** `dynamicqueries@gmail.com`
